settings.title: What's included
settings.content: The 4-sided bar necklace and the matching cuff bracelet, each laser-engraved with your coordinates. Chain length, cuff sizing, and care details go here.

settings.title: How engraving works
settings.content: 1. Enter your coordinates once (or tap “Find my coordinates”) — we lay them out on each piece exactly as engraved: latitude on the necklace front, longitude on the back, the full pair on the bracelet. 2. Add up to two more necklace sides free, or give the bracelet its own line. 3. We send a photo proof of both pieces before the set ships.

settings.atc_label: Add to cart — free engraving on every piece
